sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented. Game is isometric racing with high-resolution graphics mode on SNES.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Racing Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Game features vehicle upgrades for engine, tires, shocks, and armor that affect performance. Three vehicle types available (truck, sports car, formula car) with purely cosmetic differences.

special_mechanics.name: Track Terrain
special_mechanics.description: Courses feature complex hills and curves in isometric perspective. Track editor allows creation of custom courses with varying terrain.

tier_notes: Tier 3 (Empirical/Qualitative). This is a racing game, not a platformer, so traditional player movement physics (jump, gravity, acceleration) do not apply. No physics parameters are documented in the Wikipedia source. Game logic and engine were ported from 1985's Racing Destruction Set with minimal changes to the 16-bit SNES system.
